label: New
items: To-Do Lists are here — bundle several jobs under one date, then tick, edit or remove them from one place.
New "List" button on the Today screen and the desktop calendar agenda opens the new Add To-Do List sheet.
Global quick-add menu now includes "Add To-Do List" and "My To-Do Lists" shortcuts.
Opening a task that came from a list shows a "From: …" pill — tap it to jump straight to that list.

label: Improved
items: Today screen reordered — weather banner sits at the top, then your tasks, then what to grow this week.
"Grow this week" cards are now collapsible everywhere they appear and remember their state per surface.
The Plants tile in the main nav now uses the same Sprout icon as the Quick Access plants link.
